evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 50 Years; max age 85 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria:~* Must meet all of the following clinical criteria for MCI due to AD or mild AD and must have:~* A Clinical Dementia Rating (CDR)-Global Score of 0.5.~* Objective evidence of cognitive impairment at screening~* An MMSE score between 24 and 30 (inclusive)~* Must have a positive amyloid Positron Emission Tomography (PET) scan~* Must consent to apolipoprotein E (ApoE) genotyping~* If using drugs to treat symptoms related to AD, doses must be stable for at least 8 weeks prio...

CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* Meets National Institute of Neurological and Communicative Disorders and Stroke/Alzheimer's Disease and Related Disorders Association (NINCDS/ADRDA) criteria for probable AD~* Has a Modified Hachinski Ischemia Scale score of less than or equal to 4~* Has a Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) score of 20 through 26 at Screening visit~* Has a Geriatric Depression Scale score of less than or equal to 6 (on the staff-administered short form)~* Has had a magnetic resonance ima...

NMA_CONFIG.outcome_label: CDR-SB (Clinical Dementia Rating Sum of Boxes) change from baseline at 18 months — mean difference vs Placebo (anti-mAb minus placebo; lower = better); CDR-SB is a continuous 0-18 ordinal-derived score
NMA_CONFIG.note: v1.3: SCALE CORRECTED to MD (CDR-SB slope difference, not HR-equivalent). ENGAGE included for sensitivity completeness (pre-specified as aducanumab pivotal pair alongside EMERGE; aducanumab drops toward null when ENGAGE included — documented as selective-pivotal-reporting transparency). Star network with 3 active treatments vs Placebo (composite of per-trial placebos).

title: RapidMeta Neurology | Anti-Amyloid mAbs NMA in Early Alzheimer Disease v1.3
